name: Marriott Bonvoy American Express Card

welcome_offer.description: Earn 175,000 Marriott Bonvoy Bonus Points after spending $5,000 on eligible purchases within the first 6 months of card membership. Offer ends 5/13/26.

earning_rates.notes: Marriott Bonvoy points per dollar at hotels participating in Marriott Bonvoy (includes base member rate of 10x plus 6x from card = up to 18.5x total with Gold Elite bonus)
Restaurants worldwide (first $15,000 in combined restaurant and U.S. supermarket purchases per calendar year; then 2x)
U.S. supermarkets (first $15,000 in combined restaurant and U.S. supermarket purchases per calendar year; then 2x)

hotel_status.method: Automatic for as long as the card is open

other_benefits.name: 15 Elite Night Credits
other_benefits.description: Receive 15 elite qualifying night credits each calendar year toward Marriott Bonvoy Elite status (can be stacked with other Marriott cards)

other_benefits.name: 1,000 Bonus Points per Stay
other_benefits.description: Earn 1,000 bonus Marriott Bonvoy points for every paid eligible stay booked directly with Marriott

other_benefits.name: Free Night Award (Spending-Based)
other_benefits.description: Earn 1 Free Night Award (up to 50,000 points) after spending $15,000 on eligible purchases in a calendar year; can be topped up with up to 25,000 additional points

other_benefits.name: Premium In-Room Internet
other_benefits.description: Complimentary in-room premium internet access at Marriott Bonvoy properties

other_benefits.name: No Foreign Transaction Fees
other_benefits.description: No fees on purchases made outside the United States

sources.notes: Detailed review: $250 AF, 175K bonus after $5K/6 months, Gold Elite, 15 elite nights, earning 6x/4x/2x, secondary rental insurance, trip delay after 12 hours
Eligibility chart confirms Bonvoy Bevy as currently available Amex Marriott card (the original $95 Marriott Bonvoy Amex is no longer open to new applicants)
Official Marriott page: 175K points offer, $250 AF, Gold Elite, 6x Marriott, 4x restaurants/supermarkets (cap $15K), 2x other, 15 elite nights

notes: Note: The original Marriott Bonvoy American Express Card (formerly Starwood Preferred Guest Amex, $95 AF) is no longer open to new applicants. This profile covers the Marriott Bonvoy Bevy Amex ($250 AF, current offer 175K points after $5K/6mo, ends 5/13/26). The Bevy sits awkwardly at $250 AF with no complimentary annual free night — the similar annual-fee Marriott Boundless from Chase ($95 AF) includes an annual free night by default. The $15K spending requirement for a 50K-point free night is steep. Best value is from the automatic Gold Elite status and 15 elite night credits that stack with other Marriott cards for fast-tracking to Platinum (50 nights). No Priority Pass, no FHR/THC eligibility.
